description: A cool grove biome centered on aspen trees and light undergrowth; present in the installed 1.21.1 BOP jar.
A biome full of rainbow birch and fir trees. The grass is frosted and icy irises spawn here. No hostile mobs spawn here either.
A murky biome with willow trees, based on wetlands from the southern USA. Cattails also spawn around the shore, and ferns cover the ground.
A biome based on the Cranberry Bog. It has lots of bush plants, maple and spruce scrub, as well as reeds.
A wasteland comprised of gravel and powder snow. Some desert grass spawns here, but no passive mobs do.
A forest comprised of tall fir trees. Toadstools and various vanilla flowers such as dandelions, cornflowers and poppies litter the surface.
Variant biome of the highland with cobblestone, andesite, and stone mixed into the grassy surface. It also has steeper and more jagged terrain.
A biome with frequent rose quartz spires and crystals covering the landscape, and a pink fog color.
A sparsely populated forest, with mainly dead trees and spruce trees. Not much grass spawns in this biome either, and no passive mobs spawn.
A dry landscape with brush oak trees and bushes. Bush plants also cover the surface, and the ground is comprised of both sand and grass blocks.
A vanilla beach biome, but covered in dune grass and sea oats. Rooted sand occasionally replaces the sand in the biome.
A corrupt biome with patches of missing textures, chunks of random ones, and obsidian towers scattered throughout.
A dull ocean-like biome with floating Wispjelly and tons of dead coral, white sand, and barnacles.
A lush, mystical field, full of plant life and Empyreal Trees growing under Algal End Stone.
An active volcanic biome made of brimstone, with magma blocks, lava and brimstone fumaroles generating.
A pretty flatland with small spruce trees and oak bushes, and a variety of flowers including lilacs, rose bushes and sunflowers.
Variant of the coniferous forest with sparsely spread small fir trees.
A lush wetland with watergrass, orange cosmos, lily pads, and small dripleaves. Brush oaks and bushes spawn here as well.
Variant of the Field with more trees and less flowers.
A temperate open-grass biome from the installed 1.21.1 BOP jar; useful as a broad non-forest meadow analog.
A rainforest comprised of toadstools and huge toadstools, with a fungal green sky color. Jungle trees also spawn here.
A cave biome covered in Glowing Moss and Glowshrooms, similar to Lush Caves.
Gravel Beach is a gravel-dominated shoreline biome with occasional shipwrecks and pools of water, and very little vegetation.
An elevated plains biome with lots of tall grass and grass.
The Hot Springs biome consists of Pine and Spruce trees. Thermal Calcite borders the water.
A warm flowering grove centered on jacaranda trees; present in the installed 1.21.1 BOP jar and a good analog for humid subtropical broadleaf regions.
A densely forested mountainous biome with spruce trees and bushes. A green sky is present in this biome aswell.
A field smothered in lavender. Jacaranda trees, and less commonly, flowering oak trees, generate in this biome.
A lush version of the desert made of orange sand, with dune grass, desert grass and dead grass generating. Acacia brush trees and shrubs also spawn here.
A vast field of poppies and rose bushes. Coarse dirt and grass make up the ground in this biome. No trees spawn here.
A maple forest, also containing spruce trees. Some flowers, such as violets, dandelions and poppies spawn here as well.
A wide plain with lots of shallow lakes filled with watergrass and reeds. No trees or flowers spawn here.
A forest with pear-shaped trees, flowering oak bushes, bush plants and peonies. Calcite spawns instead of normal blocks underwater. Podzol occasionally replaces grass blocks for the surface.
Variant of the highland with lots of violets, alliums, and occasional patches of oak leaves.
An icy wetland with tall dead trees, ferns and grass. Lakes spawn frequently in this bleak biome.
A magical forest with magic, jacaranda, flowering oak, dark oak, and huge red mushrooms. Lots of flowers, such as glowflowers, blue hydrangeas and pink daffodils spawn here.
Variant biome of the dead forest with more and taller dead trees.
Variant biome of the woodland with larger and more trees.
A spooky forest with tall purple umbran trees and wither roses. Bramble also spawns in the forest. It has an ominous sky and water color.
A lush sparse forest with flowering oak trees. Rose bushes, sprouts, dandelions, poppies and oxeye daisies spawn in this biome.
A biome resembling alpha Minecraft, with the characteristic grass and leaf colors, as well as roses which were removed in 1.7.
A grassy, lush biome characterized by Huge Clover and High Grass.
Variant biome of the prairie, featuring no trees or goldenrods, and lots of barley covers the surface.
A flat yellow plain with large brush oaks, tall grass, and frequent goldenrods covering the surface.
Variant biome of the seasonal forest, featuring only orange autumn trees, and lots of pumpkins and huge pumpkins. Jack o' lanterns even spawn here less commonly.
A jungle biome full of mahogany trees. Small and big dripleaves and orange cosmos flowers cover the surface, as well as seagrass and watergrass in the water. Surface of the water can have lilypads.
A forest biome chock full of towering redwood trees and ferns. The ground is mostly made up of podzol besides sparse patches of moss blocks.
A lush, bright jungle featuring large swaths of colorful terracotta resembling mineral deposits in the ground. Trees are short and small.
A variant of the Shrubland biome cut with patches of exposed stone.
A vibrant green prairie biome dotted with single leaf block shrubs and blanketed in short grass. Wildflowers spawn commonly in patches here.
A brightly colored autumnal forest biome with red, orange, and yellow Maple Trees. The ground is scattered with Maple Leaf Piles and occasional patches of Toadstools.
A flat, warm, grassy biome speckled with short shrublike oak trees. Allium and lilac spawn frequently in patches in this biome.
Very similar to the vanilla Cherry Grove biome. Snowblossom trees consist of cherry wood and snowblossom leaves. White petals take the place of pink petals.
A snowy variant of the Coniferous Forest. Toadstools litter the undergrowth in this biome alongside small patches of wildflowers.
A snowy, open biome dotted with Fir Trees.
A snowy, forested biome, populated by a mix of red Maple and dark green spruce trees. Ferns, short grass, and red Maple Leaf Piles are the only ground cover here.
Description is not provided on the Fandom Biomes List page (listed as ???), and the biome page currently lacks a stable descriptive paragraph.
A warm, lush coastal biome with palm trees, melons, and some flowers and shrubs. One of the few biomes where White Sand can be found.
A dry and barren biome with red grass and occasional small shrubs. Cobblestone dots the landscape. No real trees spawn here.
A densely occupied nether biome, with sprouts, bramble and hellbark trees around the biome. Spore particles spawn here.
A gross biome made of flesh and porous flesh, with hair, pus bubbles and flesh tendons. Giant flesh strands spawn frequently here.
A biome that consists of black sand and some shrubs. No trees spawn here.
A rare biome consisting of Black Sand, basalt, magma blocks, and enormous pools of surface lava.
A dry, dead biome with terrain made of Dried Salt blocks. Features some sparse dead trees.
Wasteland Steppe is a higher-elevation variant of Wasteland: a harsh dried-salt biome with dead trees and sparse dead/desert grass.
A wet, marshy biome with a blue tint to the grass and leaves. Mud lines the banks, and Cattails and Reeds are common here.
Wintry Origin Valley is a snowy variant of Origin Valley that evokes Minecraft Alpha winter mode and commonly generates near frozen oceans.
A dark and spooky biome made of blackstone, obsidian and crying obsidian, with blackstone bulbs and spines generating around the landscape.
A welcoming oak forest biome rich with both large and small flowers. Fallen oak logs speckle the landscape, and passive mobs are plentiful.
